message:
feat(security): verify exact-membership revocation, document XOR filter boundary [MOR/C1.2]

Confirm revocation checks use HashMap (exact membership, zero false positives)
not XOR filters. Add 4 tests: 10K-entry zero false positives, collision-prone
IDs, seal-path exactness, 100K-lookup performance. Add security doc to
XorFilterPlaceholder clarifying it is only for gossip set reconciliation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
